Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete, up-to-date visibility into all running ad copy without anyone manually opening and reading each individual ad, ensuring nothing is missed.

Meta Investigation.action: Reads through all collected ad copy and flags every instance where a specified phrase or term appears, recording the exact ad, field, and matching text for each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance or messaging issues in seconds with precise source attribution, replacing what would be a tedious manual read-through of potentially hundreds of active creatives.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged list to the requester showing each matched phrase alongside the exact ad field and copy where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts actionable findings directly in the right person's inbox with full context, enabling immediate review and response without navigating ad platforms manually.

summary: The automation pipeline is in strong shape this week, with 24 of 53 total agents completed, 9 actively in progress, and 20 more planned and on deck. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages — the team is heads-down executing on what's already in motion. With nearly half the pipeline fully operational and running on autopilot, the foundation we're building continues to compound, and the planned queue keeps the roadmap looking exciting. Great work all around — let's keep the momentum going!
